MNIT Jaipur – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, NIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameMalaviya National Institute of Technology, Jaipur
Also Known AsMNIT
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1963
LocationJaipur, Rajasthan

NIT Jaipur: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as Malaviya Regional Engineering College Jaipur, MNIT Jaipur and NIT Jaipur.

ADDRESS

Malaviya National Institute of Technology, Jawaharlal Nehru Marg, Malviya Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan – 302017

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Jaipur International Airport
6.5 km
Gandhinagar Jaipur Railway Station
3.5 km
Jaipur Junction Railway Station
8.5 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
International Ranking
THE World University Rankings601–800 (2026)601–800 (2025)
THE Asia University Rankings201–250 (2025)201–250 (2024)
THE World Subject Rankings - Engineering601–800 (2024)--
National Ranking
NIRF Overall Rankings77 (2025)82 (2024)
NIRF Engineering Rankings42 (2025)43 (2024)
NIRF Architecture Rankings12 (2025)15 (2024)
NIRF Research Rankings50 (2025)47 (2023)
NIRF Innovation Rankings151-300 (2023)--
India Today Top Engineering Colleges18 (2025)18 (2024)
The Week Best Technical Universities India23 (2023)--
The Week Top Engineering Colleges India20 (2025)21 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Artificial Intelligence and Data Engineering
  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Metallurgical and Materials Engineering

B.Arch. - 5 Years

  • Architecture

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹15,000
One-Time Fees₹1,600
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹22,450
Annual Fees₹765
Total₹1,02,315

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹12,000
One-Time Fees₹3,000
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹6,000
Electricity & Water Charges (per Semester)₹6,000
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹20,000
Total₹47,000

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older
